You can be part of a global leader in technology and innovation, working on cutting-edge server platforms and manufacturing systems while collaborating with top talent across engineering, logistics, and operations and enjoying a dynamic work culture with opportunities for growth and impact. At our US Fulfillment Center in Whitsett, NC, we drive excellence in manufacturing and logistics to support our Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG). We are seeking a highly experienced and technically skilled Server Test Engineer to lead and optimize server production operations. This role is critical to ensuring high-quality output, process efficiency, and alignment with Lenovo’s global manufacturing standards. Key Responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive testing and validation of server hardware components. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure product quality and reliability. Develop and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts to Lenovo global standards. Identify, document, and track defects, and work with engineering teams to resolve issues. Proven ability to troubleshoot complex hardware issues. Hands on experience with Python and Bash scripting. Experience working in fast-paced manufacturing or production environments. Basic skills in IP, routing, MAC address handling, and port troubleshooting. Ability to configure PXE, DHCP, and other server services. Strong verbal and written English skills; effective team collaboration. Understanding of validation processes and test methodologies. Work Environment: Fast-paced, collaborative, and innovative environment. Emphasis on safety, sustainability, and continuous improvement. In essence, Test Engineers are the bridge between product design and the finished product, ensuring that manufacturing processes are efficient, cost-effective, and produce high-quality goods. The ideal candidate should demonstrate the ability to work independently in a high-pressure, results-oriented organization and have experience in self-management and motivating cross-functional teams to achieve business KPIs. We are actively seeking an experienced commercial contracts professional with strong negotiation skills, commercial acumen, and a practical, solutions-oriented mindset. The role of Commercial Contract Manager within Lenovo's Solutions and Services Group (SSG) represents an excellent opportunity to shape complex, high-value deals and contribute to the growth and development of this influential legal function. As a leader in its field, Lenovo offers exposure to large-scale, complex international transactions with top-tier brands and some of the most strategically significant engagements in its portfolio. As a key commercial partner to SSG across Europe and META, you will support complex services transactions, including DaaS, TruScale, and other managed service offerings. Working at the intersection of commercial strategy, legal frameworks, and delivery reality, you will help ensure deals are shaped to win, structured to perform, and governed to succeed. In doing so, you will play a central role in delivering faster, cleaner deals, enabling Legal to focus on high-impact legal risk while driving stronger contracts, better delivery outcomes, effective risk-for-value decisions, and robust in-life contract management practices. Responsibilities: Pre-Signature — Shaping and Closing Complex Deals Define the contracting route and design the commercial structure aligned to win strategy and delivery reality, supporting both direct and indirect contracting models. Lead contractual deal governance in partnership with Legal Counsel, taking contracts from draft through to signature and developing negotiation strategies that maximise value and manage concessions effectively. Set and challenge key commercial and economic levers, including credits, incentives, volume commitments, indexation, true-up/down mechanisms, benchmarking, and termination methodologies, while identifying and mitigating risks. Own the commercial elements of contracts, including Service Descriptions, SOWs, SLAs, KPIs, credits, pricing structures, governance, benchmarking, insurance, and termination/exit provisions. Partner with Legal on non-standard contractual matters, including liability, indemnities, IP, data protection, information security, governing law, and disputes, ensuring alignment between legal positions and commercial outcomes. Growth, Enablement and Innovation Establish subcontracting processes and a CCM support model, ensuring obligations and terms flow correctly between all parties involved in each transaction. Develop and enhance commercial frameworks, tools, and best-practice materials, including SLA/KPI guidance, commercial models, volume commitment options, flexibility frameworks, and legal/commercial playbooks. Deliver commercial awareness training across the business and contribute to AI-assisted commercial processes and performance metrics that support consistent, high-quality deal execution and demonstrate the value delivered by the CCM function. Requirements: 8+ years of experience in commercial contract management or a related commercial/legal discipline, with a track record in complex, multi-country IT or telecommunications services contracts. Strong drafting and negotiation skills across SOWs, SLAs/KPIs, pricing structures, service descriptions, and enterprise technology or managed services agreements, with demonstrated negotiation leadership on high-value transactions. Experience partnering with legal, sales, delivery, and finance teams in a deal-driven environment, with strong commercial acumen, sound judgement, and the ability to balance legal, commercial, and technical contract requirements. Relevant tertiary qualification. Confident and professional in customer-facing negotiations, with the ability to build trusted relationships with clients, GSI partners, and internal stakeholders at all levels. Experience with technology financing models (IT asset leasing, device lifecycle management, equipment financing) and/or subscription-based “as-a-service” commercial models such as DaaS, IaaS, or TruScale-type offerings. Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, evolving environment within changing commercial frameworks and governance programmes, with strong communication skills, professional ethics, and experience delivering commercial training or enablement to non-commercial audiences. Willingness to travel to client sites as required. What We Can Offer: Holiday purchase scheme and support for a positive work-life balance. Private medical cover, life insurance, and income protection. Attractive pension scheme. Learning and development opportunities. Employee discounts on Lenovo and Motorola products, plus a wide range of lifestyle discounts. Cycle to Work scheme and MyGymDiscounts membership

requirements: Lenovo Infrastructure Solution Group (ISG) Cloud Service Provider (CSP) team is seeking a Senior Technical Project Manager (TPM) to lead server product development for Tier-1 hyperscale customers. In this role, you will manage cross-functional development teams to deliver best-in-class server systems—spanning customer scope management, requirement clarification, design implementation, and validation. Additionally, you will collaborate with key functional teams (including Architecture, Procurement, Manufacturing, and Service) to ensure validated products transition smoothly into mass production and are successfully delivered to customers. Key Responsibilities End-to-End Program Ownership: Own and manage product development programs for Tier-1 customers. Drive comprehensive project planning (schedule and budget), proactively mitigate risks, manage stakeholder expectations, and ensure the project team achieves on-time delivery for all milestones. Cross-Functional Leadership: Lead multidisciplinary engineering and operational teams (including EE, ME, Thermal, BIOS, BMC, Validation, Manufacturing, and Supply Chain) to rapidly resolve customer-reported design, quality, compatibility, firmware, and hardware issues. Engineering Change Management: Oversee project change requests, including Engineering Change Orders (ECOs), Bill of Materials (BOM) updates, firmware/hardware revisions, and regression validation plans. Global Collaboration: Partner with global teams across the US, Taiwan, and international manufacturing sites to align priorities and ensure seamless execution. KPI & Risk Reporting: Track, analyze, and report key program metrics (KPIs), risks, and mitigation strategies to both internal executives and external customers. Customer Relationship Management: Work closely with customer program managers, system leads, and engineering teams to provide timely status updates and maintain strict alignment on priorities and deliverables. Sustaining & Quality Support: Coordinate and monitor Field Replaceable Unit (FRU) returns, Failure Analysis (FA), Root Cause Analysis (RCA), and the implementation of corrective actions. Continuous Improvement: Capture and share lessons learned and best practices to elevate team capabilities and optimize future project execution. Basic Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related technical field. 10+ years of experience in program or project management within a server or computer hardware design team, with prior ODM experience highly preferred. Deep knowledge of server architecture (including CPU, memory, storage, thermal, BMC, and BIOS) and a comprehensive understanding of the end-to-end product lifecycle—from requirement solicitation through mass production and sustaining engineering. Preferred Qualifications: Proven ability to manage complex, global cross-functional teams and drive high-pressure issue resolution under demanding customer timelines. Self-motivated leader with exceptional problem-solving abilities, strong communication skills, and a proactive mindset. Strong experience in collaborating across diverse global teams. Prior experience supporting Tier-1 hyperscale customers is highly preferred. PMP or an equivalent project management certification is a distinct advantage. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: Lenovo is seeking a motivated early career individual to join the Software Procurement team within Global Procurement, a key function of Lenovo's Global Supply Chain organization. The team supports Lenovo's PC and Smart Devices business by managing strategic software supplier relationships, commercial agreements, and operational execution for a portfolio exceeding $3B in annual spend across more than 80 global suppliers, including Microsoft, Google, Adobe, Dolby, McAfee, and Absolute. This role offers an opportunity to develop expertise in software procurement, supplier management, contract negotiations, AI technologies, and global business operations while collaborating with stakeholders across the U.S., China, and other regions worldwide. requirements: 【2027年4月入社新卒採用募集要項】 レノボでは『開発エンジニア』、『テクニカルプロジェクトマネージャー』 などの職種で新卒採用活動を実施しております。 これから当社を目指すみなさんには、様々な背景をもつスタッフとコミュニケーションをとり、自らの意見を発信していただきたいと考えています。そのために必要なのはまず、異文化を受け入れ世界に影響ある仕事をしたいというグローバルな熱意、そして論理的思考で自らの意見を的確に伝えるコミュニケーション能力。さらにエンジニアとして、みずから課題を見つけ解決方法を導き出すリーダーシップ。なにより、物づくりや最新のIT動向にアンテナを張り情報を集め続ける積極性の高さです。 以上の素養を持ち、私たちとともに、世界を舞台にイノベーションを手掛ける仕事ができるはず。グローバル企業として、若手であっても裁量権をもって仕事を進められる開発環境、そして海外に開かれたビジネスの機会を用意してみなさんをお待ちしています。 ◎具体的には以下の職種で募集しています。 (1)【正社員】開発エンジニア（勤務地：神奈川県横浜市）= 所属企業：Lenovo レノボは、世界中で愛用されているノートPC：ThinkPadで有名な、PCシェア世界No.1のグローバル企業、NECPCは、日本でPCシェアNo.1を維持し続けている、日本のPCのパイオニアとも呼ばれる存在です。R&D開発部門では主に以下の役割で新卒社員の募集を行っています。 ・機構設計・開発（メカ） PC ・ITデバイスの筐体（ボディー）の設計開発、部品の設計・評価業務など ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/so/ https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/cf/ ・電子回路設計開発（エレキ） PC ・ITデバイスの基板（マザーボード）を含んだシステム全体の設計開発など ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/yt/ ・BiOS／Firmware開発（BiOS） ハードウェアの初期化/抽象化、ユーザー認証、OS起動などシステムの基盤ソフトウエアの開発又はCPUとは独立してThinkPadを制御しているマイコン開発 ・ソフトウェア開発（ソフト） PC ・ITデバイスの(AI機能含めた)ユーティリティソフトウェア等の開発 ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/kn/ ・部品設計開発（サブシステム） 液晶パネルやワイヤレスカード、バッテリーなどの部品の設計・品質管理など ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/at/ ・テクニカル・プロジェクト・マネージャー (TPM) 国内外のチームと協力し、スケジュール、コスト、品質のプロジェクト・マネジメントを行う 。 ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/mi/ ※想定年収は大卒 478万円、院卒以上 518万円 程度を想定しています。 ◎選考を受ける事をご希望の方には、以下への参加及び提出物への対応をお願いしています。 ・会社説明会への参加 ・エントリーシートのご提出 ・追加資料 (PPTプレゼン・データ) ・適性検査受検 １．会社説明会への参加をまだしていない方は、応募資料となるご経歴が分かる情報を含め、こちらのページからエントリーをして下されば、 この後ご参加頂ける説明会の日時を複数添えて返信致しますので、まずはこの後のガイダンスに従い、説明会にご参加ください。 2. 既に会社説明会を受けた方で、応募職種が決まっている方は、当社指定フォーマットのエントリーシート及び追加資料をご提出頂くことからご対応頂く事となります。 こちらのページから応募資料をまだ登録していない方は、ご経歴が分かる情報を含めエントリーをお願いします。 同様にこの後の選考について説明させて頂きます。 それでは皆さまからのエントリー、お待ち申し上げております。 Additional

requirements: We are seeking an AI Software Engineer to join our U.S.-based Sales IT Systems team. You will build backend services using Java/Spring and develop AI/ML components using Python and a machine learning framework such as PyTorch (or equivalent). You will help deliver AI-enabled features end-to-end—from problem understanding and solution design to implementation, model training/experimentation, and production integration. We value engineers who can work with ownership, collaborate well, and bring product thinking—people who can propose ideas, challenge assumptions constructively, and drive practical outcomes. This position will follow a hybrid work model in our Morrisville, NC office. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain backend services for Sales IT systems using Java and Spring Framework/Spring Boot. Build and support microservices (REST APIs, integration patterns, service reliability/observability basics). Develop AI/ML-related code in Python, including data preparation, training experimentation, and evaluation. Participate in AI projects with hands-on model training experience (e.g., feature engineering or embeddings, training runs, metrics, iteration, reproducibility). Integrate trained models into applications (online inference APIs or batch jobs), ensuring performance, stability, and maintainability. Work with relational databases and SQL; collaborate on data modeling and query/performance considerations. Use modern engineering practices and tools (Git, code reviews, testing, CI/CD) to deliver production-quality software. Partner with stakeholders to clarify business needs, translate them into technical solutions, and iterate based on feedback. Demonstrate ownership: break down ambiguous problems, propose options, and drive tasks to completion with minimal supervision. Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field (or equivalent experience). 2+ years of experience working with programming skills (Java and Python). Preferred Qualifications Graduates from top-tier universities or those holding a Master’s degree are preferred. Familiarity with Spring Framework (Spring Boot preferred). Understanding of microservices architecture and API development. Hands-on experience with at least one ML/DL framework, e.g. PyTorch, TensorFlow, or scikit-learn. Real project experience in AI training (internship, academic, or industry), including training and evaluation of models. Working knowledge of relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL/MySQL/Oracle) and SQL. Proficiency with common development tools and workflows (Git, debugging, build tools, testing). Strong self-motivation and collaboration skills. Experience deploying AI models to production (batch/streaming/online inference) and basic MLOps concepts. Familiarity with containers and cloud (Docker/Kubernetes; AWS/Azure/GCP). Experience with distributed systems, messaging, or caching (Kafka/RabbitMQ/Redis, etc.). Ability to speak Chinese (Mandarin) is a plus. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Experienced in defining, managing and delivering large scale complex process management and business change programs. Proactive orchestrator with an eye for detail, and leadership ability. Au sein de l’équipe Channel & SMB, Lenovo France recrute un(e) Apprenti(e) Open Channel. Vous participerez au développement et au déploiement de la stratégie partenaires Open Channel de Lenovo sur le segment SMB (small & medium business). Vous serez activement impliqué(e) dans le recrutement de nouveaux partenaires, leur onboarding chez Lenovo, ainsi que dans l’animation des partenaires afin de développer le chiffre d’affaires récurrent et la fréquence d’achat. Ce poste offre une expérience terrain dans les ventes indirectes, le recrutement de partenaires et le développement commercial, dans un environnement international et dynamique. Principales responsabilités Recrutement et intégration des partenaires Identifier et contacter de manière proactive des partenaires IT non encore partenaires Lenovo (revendeurs, intégrateurs, MSP). Présenter la proposition de valeur du partenariat Lenovo et convaincre les partenaires de rejoindre l’écosystème Open Channel. Accompagner les partenaires tout au long du processus d’inscription et d’intégration Lenovo (création de compte, outils, adhésion aux programmes). Agir comme point de contact clé afin d’assurer une intégration fluide et efficace des partenaires. Activer et animer des partenaires Animer un portefeuille de partenaires Open Channel afin de développer une activité récurrente avec Lenovo. Aider les partenaires à tirer pleinement parti des offres Lenovo, promotions, incentives et programmes partenaires. Accompagner la réalisation des premières ventes et la montée en puissance progressive des partenaires sur l’ensemble des portefeuilles Lenovo (PC, solutions, services). Développement commercial et suivi de la performance Suivre l’activité des partenaires (commandes, fréquence d’achat, évolution du chiffre d’affaires). Identifier les partenaires à fort potentiel et définir des actions d’activation ciblées. Contribuer au suivi des indicateurs clés de performance (taux d’activation, récurrence, fréquence d’achat, sell-in / sell-out). Participer à la préparation des revues business partenaires et internes. Support Channel et coordination interne Soutenir les Account Managers Channel & Distribution dans la gestion quotidienne des partenaires Open Channel. Relayer auprès des partenaires les informations clés (offres, campagnes, nouveautés produits). Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes Ventes, Marketing, Opérations et Supply afin d’optimiser l’expérience partenaires. Garantir la mise à jour fiable des outils CRM et de reporting Channel. Profil recherché Étudiant(e) en Commerce, Vente ou Management (niveau licence ou master). Fort intérêt pour les ventes B2B, les modèles économiques indirects et les écosystèmes partenaires. À l’aise avec les chiffres, Excel et les outils de reporting. Proactif(ve), organisé(e) et rigoureux(se). Excellentes capacités de communication et fort esprit d’équipe. Français courant et anglais professionnel requis. Ce que nous offrons Une alternance opérationnelle, au cœur de l’organisation Channel de Lenovo. Une exposition directe au recrutement et à l’activation des partenaires. Un environnement international, dynamique et orienté apprentissage.Un développement solide de compétences en ventes indirectes, gestion de partenaires et analyse business. Pourquoi rejoindre Lenovo France ? Head of Service Channels ■ Job Summary （職務概要） 本ポジションは、 Lenovo Japan の eService 領域（ Support Site 、 FAQ 、 Chat 、 AI などのセルフサービスチャネル）の責任者として、日々の運営管理から戦略立案、継続的改善までをリードし、顧客体験（ CX ）の向上と自己解決率の最大化を推進します。 顧客の声（ VOC ）や各種 KPI を基に課題を特定し、データドリブンな改善サイクルを確立することで、サービス品質向上とコスト最適化を実現します。 また、本ポジションは Service 本部 Director およびリーダーシップチームの戦略パートナーとして、事業方針や変革アジェンダを具体的な実行計画へ落とし込み、組織横断での推進をリードします。日本・ AP ・グローバルをつなぐハブとなり、関係部門との連携を通じて重要施策の実行と成果創出を推進していただきます。 ■ Key Responsibilities （主な職務内容） ① eService 運営統括 ・ eService 全体（ Support Site / FAQ / Chat / AI ）の運営責任 ・サービス品質、 CX 、自己解決率、コスト KPI 管理 ・ VOC および Web 分析データに基づく改善推進 ・ AI 活用によるサービス高度化 ・ベンダーおよび関係部門マネジメント ② 組織横断推進・業務変革 ・業務プロセス標準化および最適化 ・組織横断施策の推進 ・ AP/Global との連携および Best Practice 導入 ・中長期変革アジェンダ推進 ③ Leadership Partnership & Strategic Execution ・事業方針をアクションプランへ落とし込み実行推進 ・事業計画、予算、 QBR 、 Business Review 支援 ・重要プロジェクトの進捗・リスク管理 ・ Japan/AP/Global 横断プロジェクト推進 ・データ分析による意思決定支援 ・ Services Director の信頼できるパートナーとして組織成果最大化に貢献 ■ Qualifications （応募要件） 【必須要件】 ・サービス運営、事業オペレーション、事業企画等の領域におけるマネジメント経験 ・ピープルマネジメント経験 ・ KPI 管理および業務改善をリードした経験 ・部門横断でプロジェクトを推進した経験 ・経営方針や事業戦略を実行計画へ落とし込み推進した経験 ・優れたコミュニケーション能力およびステークホルダーマネジメント能力 ・ AP またはグローバルチームとの協業経験 ・ビジネスレベルの英語力 【歓迎要件】 ・ eService 、 Web サポート、 FAQ 、 Chat 、セルフサービスチャネルの運営経験 ・コンタクトセンターまたはカスタマーサポート領域での経験 ・ CX 改善プロジェクトの経験 ・ AI 、チャットボット、ナレッジマネジメント領域の経験 ・デジタルトランスフォーメーションまたは業務改革プロジェクトの経験 ・ハードウェアメーカー、 IT 、テクノロジー、 eCommerce 業界での経験 Additional

requirements: Key Responsibilities Customer Demand Research & Analysis : Conduct in-depth communication with end customers, sort out and refine business and technical requirements for robotic applications, clarify project scope, technical indicators and delivery standards, and form standardized requirement documents. Customized Solution Design : Collaborate with internal R&D teams and external partners to design, demonstrate, customize and optimize overall solution architectures for diverse industrial scenarios, based on the company’s core product capabilities of inspection quadruped robots, industrial operation robots and logistics robots. POC Verification & Pre-sales Support : Independently plan, design and verify customer POC. Provide professional technical consultation, solution presentation and technical argumentation to support sales teams in resolving pre-sales technical issues and facilitating contract signing. Project Delivery & Implementation Support : Provide continuous technical support during project implementation, track the full delivery process, verify solution implementation effects, and ensure all deliverables meet SOW and customer acceptance standards for smooth project final acceptance. Solution Iteration & Technical Optimization : Continuously optimize the architecture, functions and performance of robotic application solutions to ensure their advancement, stability and reliability. Summarize industry experience to drive standardized and productized iteration of solutions. Job Requirements Educational Background : Bachelor’s degree or above in engineering majors including Automation, Mechanical/Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Mechatronics and other related fields. Professional Experience : Minimum 8 years of working experience in robot solution pre-sales or solution architecture roles. Proven experience in customized design and full-cycle delivery of robot industry solutions, familiar with technical logic, application scenarios and delivery standards of industrial, inspection and logistics robots. Comprehensive Competence : Strong technical comprehension and solution design capabilities, able to match customer demands with product technologies efficiently. Excellent bilingual communication and cross-departmental collaboration skills to coordinate resources and drive project progress. Language Proficiency : Fluent in both spoken and written Chinese and English, capable of smooth technical communication and document compilation in bilingual environments. Personal Quality : Rigorous logical thinking, strong sense of responsibility and project control ability, capable of independently solving technical and collaborative problems in solution design and project implementation. Preferred Competencies Familiar with the working principle, core parameters and application limitations of robot dog inspection and AGV/AMR logistics robots; Familiar with the business processes and inspection standards of electric power, mining, petrochemical and other industries; Experience in leading POC verification, solution bidding and full-process project delivery of robotic industry projects. company_name: 众安在线财产保险股份有限公司
job_name: 一、对于招聘的不同认知
job_title: 一、对于招聘的不同认知
requirements: 人力专业知识 识人能力 主人翁意识 2.猎头+行业分析员+企业面试官 招聘人员的理想状态是：猎头+行业分析员+企业面试官。 猎头：迅速+高效+敏锐 企业面试官：业务+人力把控 行业分析员：专业+战略+分析 3.招聘人员易犯错误 不过，我们很多的小伙伴他可能只是刚刚处于入门，可能是刚刚去从招聘的角度、企业面试官的角度进行一些判断，所以其实招聘人员也容易有一些这样那样的问题。 业务不熟悉，理解有偏差 这个可能更多体现在一些刚刚进入招聘领域的同仁，有可能会有一些理解上的偏差。 对企业整体了解和把握不足 对公司整体性了解不足，以至于对一些招聘的具体的情况也把握不足。 横向沟通、整合资源能力弱 那么，最有效的招聘是什么？其实是资源的整合。最深远的招聘是什么？其实是雇主品牌的建设。而最现实的招聘就是招聘人员综合能力的提升。 二、找什么样的人？ 1.冰山素质模型 知识：指在特定领域了解的专业知识。 技能：指运用知识完成具体工作的能力。 价值观、角色定位：指一个人对职业的预期和对事物的看法。 自我认知：指对自己的认识（性格，特长，优势，劣势等） 个性、品质：指一个人持续而稳定的行为特性。 内驱力、动机：指人内在的自然而持续的想法和偏好。 相信作为HR对“冰山素质模型”并不陌生，特别是冰山以上的部分：知识、技能，这些和基本行为都是表象的，非常容易通过一些方式加以判定。真正迷惑我们的或者不好去判定的是潜在的部分： 价值观、角色认定、自我认知、个性等。 2.人才素质维度 另外，我们还需要结合各自公司的使命、愿景、价值观，以及用人理念来构建属于自己的独特人才素质维度。 首先我们来看素质维度的底层逻辑是什么？ 最底层是知识技能部分，包含管理支持、行业支持等方面，知识技能之上就是专业维度，指的是专业素质、专业能力和业务资源，那么再往上递升的话就是管理维度，包括管理素质管理能力，到顶端部分，其实也就是特质、价值观的部分。那么，为什么把价值观放在顶端？其实这个是真正能够判定人才的最核心部分之一。 其他部分其实是可以加以弥补的，比如说专业知识、专业性等方面，但价值属性、价值观是不容易去改变的。所以这是一个很重要的基础，判定这个人能不能跟公司的价值观吻合。 3.周密的招聘计划 招聘需求： 首先要明确用人部门是不是能把招聘的岗位名称、需要招聘的数量描述清楚，清楚岗位本身，比如薪酬福利等方面。 岗位说明书： 岗位的基本描述以及任职资格。 招聘预算： 清楚一个人才的成本区间，需要采用怎样的宣传策略、招聘渠道等。 甄选方案： 采用笔试、测评、面试等方法进行甄选。 4. 开展岗位分析，撰写岗位说明书 开展岗位分析这个部分对人员本身的画像来说非常重要，撰写岗位申请书则包括了岗位描述和任职资格两部分：设置目的、工作职责、组织图表、业绩标准、工作权限、职责履行程序；知识、技能、能力、个性特征、培训需求。 三、如何招人？ 1.神奇的人才地图 通过绘制“人才地图” 可以快速了解人才市场、锁定关键人才， 帮助我们摸清楚这些问题：我所招聘的人员，我所需求的人员，他们到底在哪里？他们目前的动态到底是什么样的？我们真正能够吸引他的会在哪些方面？薪资该如何对标？等等。 行业调研 结合招聘岗位，开展行业调研，建立起对行业的准确认知。当我们对行业本身有大的框架性思路和认知后，就会发现有些方面会越来越精准。 竞品企业分析 选取行业TOP10企业，展开对标分析。对于竞品公司，尤其是要选取行业里边的前10到前20名企业，展开一些对标分析，是具有一定的参考价值的。 基本情况：公司简介、发展历程、股权结构、资产规模、业务分析、主要产品、财务分析 管理团队：董事会、总经理、副总经理等姓名、年龄、背景资料 组织架构：组织架构现状、组织架构的变化调整分析 人力资源：员工数、人员构成、人才饱和度、人才来源 发展前景：发展方向、战略前景、战略目标 人才地图的构建 人才地图里面会分为几个它的应有必要项，比如说年龄、性别、学历，现在的职位，他的直接的上下属是什么？他目前的薪资状况是什么？有没有一些其他的股权等等。通过这一系列的要素，我们会有一个综合得分，建议大家从企业和行业两个维度构建整个人才地图。 当然有的公司可能现在还没有办法从整个行业构建，就可以先从企业的角度构建人才地图，将来再从整个大行业的角度去构建，实现人才地图的1.0到2.0版本的升级。 2.甄选及流程设置 制定方案 常见的人才甄选方法，相信大家都不陌生，从结构化面试、行为面试法、角色扮演、无领导小组讨论，到测评、背调、笔试等等。在自己公司特定的场景之下，我们也可以选择其中的一种或几种相结合。 同时，除了常见的人才甄选方法以外，我们要制定有效的甄选方案，从4个维度入手： 甄选方法的选择，甄选团队如何去搭建，流程如何去制定以及最终的录用决策方式， 这几个维度来制定有效的甄选方案。 精准邀约 每一个面试官都会经历邀约的过程，现在邀约的方式也更加多元化，不管是哪一种方法，通过邀约的过程其实是跟候选人做了一对一的沟通，对这个候选人是否适合我们有了第一步的判定。 简历细节核实： 通过邀约、沟通的过程，可以对简历细节进行一步一步核实。当如果有吐字不清或观点不清的情况，建议通过邀约就直接拒绝进入下一个环节，因为可能他们不适合企业的需求。 人岗匹配度初判： 如果通过跟他的沟通，发现这个人的经验和你要求的差距特别大，只是简历写得还不错，也建议不要进入下一个环节。 推荐公司，邀请面试： 我们在邀约过程之中介绍本公司的一些情况以及一些优劣势的方面，更多的可能是关于公司的优势方面，但是如果有下面的这种情形的，我们建议不要进入下一环节：比如说在邀约过程中，候选人朋友态度非常冷漠，不屑于沟通，如果来到公司以后，他很难能够跟公司团队融合。 薪酬调查：当我们发现薪资期望严重超标的情况，我们也需要谨慎。 精准邀约以后，我们可以进入下一个环节，就是候选人进入到我们的公司，这样我们就会有一个面谈的机会，分工如下：人力资源部门面试、业务部门面试。 人力资源部门面试：重点考察价值观、组织文化匹配度、素质能力、意愿动机等。 业务部门面试：重点考察专业能力、资源能力、团队匹配度等。 上图列举的这6类，可能很多公司一直在用，包含 结构化面试、行为面试法、迷彩面试法、压力面试法、放松面试法和情景面试法。 说到精准面谈，不得不提到样去让流程更加无缝对接，怎样形成一个完整闭环。 我们公司有一个基本的要求，他进入公司以后，候选人在第一时间能够看到我们的面试官。我们要求面试官在门口或者是某一个位置去迎接候选人朋友，通过候选人的言行举止、外在形象等等其实也可以得出一个初步的判定。迎接完以后，我们会让候选人朋友做一些自我介绍等。 简单的环节后面有大的逻辑，因为每个人的表达逻辑条理和性格都是不太一样的。通过这个过程之中，你可以对他有一个比较初步的判断，当然这只是第一环节，在面试的过程之中，还会通过知识、技能，他的专业能力素质以及管理能力素质去做进一步的判定。 另外，关于价值观，很多人会问价值观要通过什么样的考量方法来实现？其实可以用我们熟悉的一种方法，通过有一些问题去判定，如果是他会怎样去决策？基本上几个问题就能看出他的价值观是什么样的。 3.决策录用 通过前面一系列环节进入了最关键的部分：录用决策。 关于录用决策流程和事项，有的公司有面试评价表、审批表，只要按内部各自公司的流程进行即可。当然给到候选人朋友，可能就需要有一个口头通知/电话沟通，但是也建议能够正式发一份offer，内容建议把入职时间、岗位、职级、薪酬福利等描述清晰，形成一个相对比较完整的闭环。 录用决策有上图 “十大禁忌” ，当然可能也不仅限于此。 过多的推销公司，忽略双向交流。 很多面试官很少给对方去交流的机会，没有询问对方是不是有一些需要了解的部分，形成一种单向沟通的模式。 无意义的提问。 很多候选人在听公司面试官的问题的时候，对方也有一个判定，很多问题跟录用本身其实没有什么瓜葛，没有什么关联度，但往往还一而再再而三地进行提问，无意中会让候选人产生一种反感。 不合理的面试时间安排。 举个例子，面试时间安排在晚上9点以后，这个会让对方首先有一个不明确的推测，这是有悖于正常的面试安排时间的，因此我们建议安排在正常工作时间范围之内去进行。 考察方法过于单一，仅是提问。 往往大家只采用了一种提问式，比如说，有一部分人员属于面霸类型，经历了很多面试。所以你想要问的问题，他都已经非常清晰，可能比面试官还要清晰。因此有一些特殊岗位，我们建议方法不要太过单一，不能只是提问，比如说还可以有一些情景问答等方式。 四、如何跟踪评估？ 以上是关于录用决策本身，但我们把人员录用了以后，就形成闭环了吗？不是这样的，如果真正形成闭环，是要做持续性的跟踪与评估的。这个部分我们会分为入职人员和未入职人员两个部分去跟踪和评估。 入职人员如何去跟踪？ 当我们发放了offer以后，他进入公司、部门以后，我们与用人部门做持续性沟通，去了解这个人是不是能够真正进入这个角色、是否适应。 很多公司都会采用比如指导员或师傅的模式，让入职人员他能够快速进入角色，适应公司的文化，快速实现个人的价值。那么同时的话也还有一点，它可以采用一种定期或不定期的这种沟通的方式。我们经常采用的是三天、一周、一个月、两个月、三个月这几个时间段去做定期沟通，这样持续性的跟踪来了解我们所录用的人员是不是真正能存活，是不是面临一些问题，让我们可以及时有效地协助解决。 未入职人员如何跟踪？ 其实我们可以看一下，本来一些比较有意向的人员、我们非常满意的人员为什么没有进入公司？比如挖掘分析未入职原因，可能里边有一些共性的东西；还要提醒我们注意这些候选人更重视什么、更期待什么，在我们的公司里面是不是有弥补的措施？ 同时，大家也可以和他们建立一个朋友的关系，定期去沟通和联系，建立了一个信任的基础。另外，我个人建议这些人员都能够进入公司的简历库，做好有效长效的跟踪，让我们的招聘工作更趋于完整化。 跟踪评估的目的 跟踪评估的目的其实在于： 收集意见，必要时提供帮助与支持；关注录用人选工作状态及动向，维护公司用人安全；根据反馈的信息，改进提升招聘工作。 通过一系列的跟踪过程，让整个招聘工作形成一个完整的闭环状态。 responsibilities: 和要求：职位设计应该明确工作内容和要求，包括所需的技能、知识和经验等，以便为职位招聘和培养合适的人才。 职位层级和关系：职位设计应该考虑职位的层级和关系，确保各个职位之间的协调和合作。 二、职责分配 职责分配是管理职位系统的核心，它涉及到将职位的目标和职责分配给具体的人员。在职责分配过程中，需要考虑以下几个方面： 人员匹配：根据职位的要求和人员的能力、经验和兴趣等，将合适的人员分配到相应的职位上，以确保职责的有效履行。 职责明确：职责分配应该明确具体的工作任务和目标，以便管理者和员工都清楚自己的职责和期望。 协作和沟通：职责分配应该考虑到不同职位之间的协作和沟通，以确保工作的顺利进行和团队的高效运作。 三、管理者选拔 管理者的选拔是管理职位系统中的重要环节，他们对组织的运作和发展起着关键作用。在管理者选拔过程中，需要考虑以下几个方面： 背景和经验：选择具有相关背景和经验的候选人，以便他们能够理解和应对组织的挑战和需求。 领导能力：评估候选人的领导能力，包括沟通能力、决策能力、团队合作能力等，以确保他们能够有效地管理和激励团队。 适应性和学习能力：选择具有适应性和学习能力的候选人，以便他们能够适应不断变化的组织环境和需求。 四、职位评估 职位评估是管理职位系统的重要环节，它涉及到对职位的绩效和效果进行评估和反馈。在职位评估过程中，需要考虑以下几个方面： 目标和指标：设定明确的目标和指标，以便衡量职位的绩效和效果。 反馈和改进：及时提供反馈和建议，帮助管理者和员工改进工作方法和效果。 职位调整和发展：根据评估结果，进行必要的职位调整和发展，以适应组织的变化和需求。 管理职位系统是组织中的一个重要组成部分，它涉及到职位的设计、职责的分配和管理者的选拔。一个良好的管理职位系统可以帮助组织实现目标，提高工作效率，促进员工发展和组织的可持续发展。通过职位设计、职责分配、管理者选拔和职位评估等方面的工作，组织可以构建一个高效的管理职位系统，为组织的成功和发展奠定基础。 相关文章 构建高效管理职位系统：优化组织运作的关键 在现代企业中，管理职位系统扮演… 社招系统常用的功能有哪些呢？ 如今市场上想要招聘到一个合适的… 求职招聘管理软件：连接求职者与招聘者，优化招聘体验 在现代化的求职与招聘环境中，求… 标签： 管理职位系统 继续阅读 以前的文章 构建高效管理职位系统：优化组织运作的关键 在下一篇文章 管理职位系统的重要性和实施方法 你可能也喜欢 优质Offer管理：吸引人才塑造企业形象 2023年11月28日 2026年企业绩效系统选型指南：现状对比与性价比高的TOP品牌推荐 2026年4月9日 员工绩效考核软件：激发潜力，提高生产力 2023年10月18日 Moka, 全员体验更好的人力资源管理系统 相关文章 构建高效管理职位系统：优化组织运作的关键 在现代企业中，管理职位系统扮演… 社招系统常用的功能有哪些呢？ 如今市场上想要招聘到一个合适的… 求职招聘管理软件：连接求职者与招聘者，优化招聘体验 在现代化的求职与招聘环境中，求… 招聘系统 招聘管理系统 招聘流程管理 搭建人才库 海外ATS招聘系统 Moka People 人事管理系统 绩效管理系统 薪酬管理系统 组织人事管理 考勤管理系统 © 2022 北京希瑞亚斯科技有限公司 All rights reserved. 京ICP备15060035号-3 京公网安备11010802024479号 Moka 是一款新生代的 SaaS 智能化招聘管理系统， 包含三大核心模块：聚合招聘渠道，统一管理招聘流程，提升各节点转化率，促进协同； 积累企业人才库，自动且有效的进行持续激活；全方位数据统计，提供招聘洞见–全面帮助企业提升招聘效能。 产品功能 招聘流程管理 企业人才库 数据分析 客户成功 公司相关 关于我们 客户案例 加入我们 媒体报道 博客 售前咨询：400-101-6133 © 2020 北京希瑞亚斯科技有限公司. responsibilities: 四川川投能源股份有限公司（简称川投能源）于1993年在上交所上市（证券代码600674），通过一系列资产重组和稳健经营，确立了以水电清洁能源为主和铁路信息产业为辅的发展格局，逐步成长为主业稳固、业绩优良、运作规范、公司治理佳、市场形象优的上市公司，肩负着管理经营川投集团主要优质资产的重任，拥有12家投资企业，其中全资及控股企业5家：田湾河公司、川投电力、天彭电力、嘉阳电力、交大光芒；参股企业7家：雅砻江公司、国电大渡河、国电大岗山、长飞四川公司、川投售电公司、中德阿维斯公司和中德西拉子公司。 为满足审计部工作需要，现面向全社会公开招聘，有关事项公告如下： 一、招聘职位： 审计监察部法务管理岗员工1名 二、招聘人员基本条件： 1.具有良好的政治思想素质、对党忠诚，坚持实事求是、有开拓创新精神，有强烈的责任感、使命感、敬业精神； 2.忠于川投能源事业，工作业绩突出，具有较强的组织、协调能力和管理经验，有较强的分析问题和解决问题能力； 3.具有应聘岗位所需的政策、理论水平、专业管理知识和专业业务能力，具有较强的公文写作能力和良好的口头表达能力，具有较好的人际理解力以及抗压能力； 4.坚持原则，顾全大局，作风正派，秉公办事，廉洁自律，善于团结群众。 三、招聘人员任职资格： 1.中共党员(正式党员)； 2. 取得国家教育部学历认证的全日制大学本科及以上学历； 3.2017年9月21日教育部、财政部、国家发展改革委联合发布的《关于公布世界一流大学和一流学科建设高校及建设学科名单的通知》中正式确认公布的世界一流大学和一流学科建设高校的法学专业毕业生（民商法专业优先）； 4.取得法律职业资格(A证)或律师资格； 5.本科学历需具备五年以上党政机关或企业法务工作经验；硕士研究生学历需具备三年以上党政机关或企业法务工作经验； 6. 年龄不超过40周岁（年龄计算截止时间为2018年7月31日）; 7.熟悉公司法和证券监管法律、法规、政策，具备金融、管理、财务相关知识，具备较强执行、学习、沟通和决策能力； 8.身心健康； 9.具有拟引进职位所要求的其他资格条件，特别优秀的可适当放宽条件。 凡有下列情形之一者，不得报名： 1.曾受过司法机关刑事处罚的； 2.涉嫌违法、违纪正在接受审查的； 3.尚未解除党纪、政纪处分的； 4.曾被开除公职、被辞退的； 5.违反有关规定不适宜报考的。 四、薪酬待遇： 薪酬面议 五、应聘须知： 有意向者请将应聘报名表、身份证、学历学位、职业资格或职称等相关资质证书扫描件发送至招聘邮箱，邮件主题为“应聘者姓名+应聘岗位”。 联系人：王歆、叶汶欣 招聘邮箱： rlb@ctny.com.cn 。 联系电话：028-86098677、028-86098667 本公告未尽事宜，由四川川投能源股份有限公司负责解释。 简历模板： 应聘申请表.docx 岗位说明书.docx 微信公众号 手机版 关于我们 公司简介 组织架构 领导团队 企业荣誉 新闻中心 公司新闻 企业动态 最新公告 加入我们 人才招聘 联系我们 股票代码： 600674.SH  中国·四川·成都·武侯区临江西路1号川投大厦  (+86)028-86098649  (+86)028-86096948  ctny@ctny.com.cn --川投站群-- --友情链接-- 川投集团 四川川投能源股份有限公司 版权所有 © All Rights Reserved. 蜀ICP备2022021534号 川公网安备51010702003046号 隐私保护 | 版权所有 | 网站地图 

company: 四川省投资集团有限责任公司
company_name: 四川省投资集团有限责任公司
responsibilities: 四川川投能源股份有限公司（简称“川投能源”）是川投集团控股的上市公司，证券代码600674。在川投集团和公司董事会的正确领导下，川投能源通过一系列资产重组、资本营运和稳健经营，确立了以水电清洁能源为主，高铁信息产业为辅的发展格局，业已成长为主业稳固、业绩优良、运作规范、公司治理佳、市场形象好的上市公司，2018年6月公司成功入选MSCI新兴市场指数和MSCI ACWI全球指数。 截至2018年末，川投能源总资产320亿元，净资产253亿元，总股本44亿股，总市值382亿元。主要投资企业有：雅砻江公司、田湾河公司、川投电力、交大光芒、天彭电力、国电大渡河公司、三峡新能源、乐飞光电等。为满足工作需要，现面向全社会公开招聘，有关事项公告如下： 一、招聘职位： 办公室副主任岗1名，党群部党群管理岗一般员工1名。 二、招聘人员基本条件： 1.具有良好的政治思想素质、拥护中国共产党的路线方 针政策，坚持实事求是； 2.忠于川投能源事业，工作踏实、爱岗敬业； 3.具有应聘岗位所需的政策、理论水平、专业管理知识 和专业业务能力，具有较强的公文写作能力和良好的口头表达能力，具有较好的人际理解力以及抗压能力； 4.坚持原则，顾全大局，作风正派，秉公办事，廉洁自律，善于团结群众。 三、招聘人员任职资格： （一）办公室副主任 1.国内双一流全日制大学本科及以上学历，中文、行政管理、企业管理、档案管理等相关专业，具备文秘、企业管理、档案管理相关知识； 2.5年以上办公室文秘相关工作经验； 3.熟练使用MS Office，特别是Word、Execl、PPT等办公软件； 4.较强的公文写作能力，良好的文字和口头表达能力； 5.良好的人际交往与沟通协调能力； 6.年龄不超过40周岁，能适应随领导出差和加班; 7.身心健康。 （二）党群管理岗一般员工 1.中共党员； 2.国内双一流全日制大学本科及以上学历，汉语言文学、哲学、法律、新闻、行政管理类相关专业； 3.5年及以上党群或新闻媒体工作经历； 4.熟悉党建、工会、宣传、活动组织等方面相关知识和工作流程，具有较强的文字功底和写作能力、沟通协调和组织执行能力； 5.熟练掌握PPT、音频视频编辑等应用软件； 6.年龄不超过40周岁，能适应经常性加班和出差; 7.身心健康。 （四）凡有下列情形之一者，不得报名： 1.曾受过司法机关刑事处罚的； 2.涉嫌违法、违纪正在接受审查的； 3.尚未解除党纪、政纪处分的； 4.曾被开除公职、被辞退的； 5.违反有关规定不适宜报考的。 注：1.上述应聘人员中特别优秀的，条件可适当放宽，但需经考察组认定后方可作为竞聘人选。 2.应聘人员的年龄及任职计算截止时间为2019年2月28日。 四、薪酬待遇： 薪酬面议 五、应聘须知： 有意向者请将应聘报名表、身份证、学历学位、职业资格或职称等相关资质证书扫描件，于报名截止时间（2019年3月8日下午17:00）前发送至招聘邮箱，邮件主题为“应聘者姓名+应聘岗位”。 联系人：王女士、叶女士 招聘邮箱： rlb@ctny.com.cn 。 联系电话：028-86098677、028-86098667 本公告未尽事宜，由四川川投能源股份有限公司负责解释。 简历模板： 应聘申请表.doc 微信公众号 手机版 关于我们 公司简介 组织架构 领导团队 企业荣誉 新闻中心 公司新闻 企业动态 最新公告 加入我们 人才招聘 联系我们 股票代码： 600674.SH  中国·四川·成都·武侯区临江西路1号川投大厦  (+86)028-86098649  (+86)028-86096948  ctny@ctny.com.cn --川投站群-- --友情链接-- 川投集团 四川川投能源股份有限公司 版权所有 © All Rights Reserved. 蜀ICP备2022021534号 川公网安备51010702003046号 隐私保护 | 版权所有 | 网站地图 

requirements: 工作职责 采购生态寻源 ： 负责智能 辅助驾驶域控制器ADCU、 座舱域控制器 Headunit，或其他车身域控 系统 设备的原材料采购寻源工作。主要偏向电子类半导体物料。需要负责供应商资源寻找，RFQ与报价处理，价格谈判，合同签署，供应商关系维护，分类原材料 供应商 管理策略等 负责与集团内部的跨部门采购部门协作，共同推进采购寻源定点， 成本改善，价格信息收集 等工作。例如全球采购平台的相关产品线采购 团队 ，以及ODM工厂的采购团队等 与零件工程师配合，改善BOM零件选型策略，BOM优化，变更管理， 成本分析与优化， VAVE等工作 供应链运营： 参与新业务/项目报价流程，负责报价过程中的BOM成本信息收集整理，并与成本经理配合工作，持续优化改善 负责收集整理周报、月报等供应链相关会议资料。主持并整理会议纪要以及待办项，并跟踪落实。 协同研发、质量、运营等部门，优化供应链相关的流程、规范、体系， 持续 优化成本 并改善部门工作效率 任职要求 学历与专业 计算机、软件工程、电子工程、自动化或相关专业本科及以上学历 工作经验 8 年以上汽车电子 行业采购、经营、运营等端到端的业务相关经验 其中至少 5 年以上智能座舱或 智能辅助驾驶产品相关企业工作经验 技术技能 精通 汽车电子行业采购流程，包含供应商开发，选型，报价，定点，合同签署等 精通汽车电子行业客户报价流程，包含BOM成本，生产费用，研发设备分摊等。同时理解Business Case核算规则，具备一定的财务知识 熟练掌握Office，如Excel制表制图，PPT编制与美化等 软技能 具备出色的逻辑思维、问题分析与解决能力 具备良好的沟通协调能力，能够有效推动跨团队项目进展 加分项 具备SAP系统操作经验 具备业务导向的经营和运营工作经验，例如business case分析与报告等 Additional

requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 产品营销全生命周期管理（核心） 1.1 独立负责ThinkBook产品从市场需求分析、客户群研究、产品导入到RTM（Route to Market）策略制定及落地。 1.2 统筹新品上市全过程（上市节奏、传播策略、渠道打法、定价策略）。 1.3 构建产品从预热、爆发到长尾的全周期营销体系 2. 整合营销与增长驱动 2.1 参与年度及重点节点整合营销campaign 2.2 打通电商平台、渠道销售、内容营销、品牌传播，实现全链路转化 2.3 基于用户洞察与数据分析，持续优化营销策略与ROI 3. 品牌与产品价值输出 3.1 基于品牌主张与产品定位，制定清晰的产品传播策略与核心卖点 3.2 带领团队围绕目标客群进行精细化运营与内容策划，联动Marketing团队输出品牌价值与整合传播内容（campaign / IP /内容营销） 岗位要求： 1. 5-8年及以上IT/3C行业产品营销经验 2. 有PC行业主流品牌产品营销负责人或关键岗位经验者优先 3. 有完整产品上市或整合营销项目操盘经验 Additional

requirements: Job Responsibilities: Lead the design, develop, and implement AI Agent and tools for supply chain-related business scenarios, covering both frontend and backend logic. Drive the engineering and deployment of LLM applications, including backend services; explore innovative applications of large language models within the supply chain domain to enhance operational efficiency. Take ownership of core tools/modules and frameworks, participating in system architecture design and technical decision-making. Collaborate effectively with business stakeholders and algorithm engineers to ensure technical feasibility, propose system architecture solutions, and drive optimal user experience implementation. Lead and participate in the design and development of AI applications and tools and AI building blocks. Participate in or lead troubleshooting and performance optimization efforts to ensure system availability, stability, and scalability. Participate in or lead the development of team technical infrastructure, continuously improving full-stack engineering efficiency and optimizing the business experience. Job Requirements Familiarity with mainstream AI Agent frameworks and design concepts; proficient in using tools and framework such as LangChain, Langraph, AutoGPT, Harness, and practical AI engineering implementation experience. Understanding of LLM model invocation pipelines, tool usage, OpenAI API specifications, and prompt optimization techniques. Proficient with architectures design and implement of React, ToT, Plan & Execute Hands-on experience with Agent Memory and Context management design and development. Proficiency in Python; familiar with high-concurrency and multi-threaded development; experience with SSE, Socket programming, and streaming frameworks; experience in designing and developing distributed, high-concurrency systems. Proficient in mainstream Python web frameworks such as Django, Flask, or FastAPI. Proficient in middleware technologies such as MySQL/PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, etc. Familiar with Vue or React and their core ecosystems; experience with common UI component libraries such as ElementUI or Ant Design. Solid understanding of W3C standards, HTML4/HTML5, CSS2/CSS3, and ES5/ES6. Experience with build tools like Webpack or Vite; practical skills in performance tuning, code splitting, and Tree-Shaking. Strong computer science foundation and algorithmic thinking. Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills; strong sense of responsibility, initiative, and teamwork abilities. Passionate about tracking advancements in AI and full-stack technologies; eager to learn and share; maintains a positive communication attitude and can thrive under pressure. A bachelor's degree or above in computer science, artificial intelligence, data science, software engineering, mathematics, or a related field is required; a master's or doctoral degree is preferred. Ability to have good communicate in English, both written and verbal. 5+ years of experience in software backend development, including 2+ years focused on AI Agent systems. Practical business project implementation experience with LLM application development. In-depth research or practical project experience in multi-agent interaction, agent collaboration, or Agent engineering systems. Proficiency in machine learning and deep learning algorithms; end-to-end experience in modeling, design, and development of simulation or prediction projects. Hands-on experience in development of AI + automation. Additional

requirements: AI Services Finance Controller Position Summary The AI Services Finance Controller serves as the primary finance business partner for the AI Services organization. The role leads financial planning, reporting, commercial analysis, and process development for a complex and rapidly evolving business. In addition to the core finance responsibilities, this role will help drive the Finance team’s AI transformation by identifying opportunities and building practical AI-enabled solutions to improve reporting, analysis, and finance operations. Key Responsibilities: Lead budgeting, forecasting, monthly performance reviews, and management reporting for the AI Services business. Identify finance use cases for AI and automation, and build practical solutions using tools such as OpenClaw, Copilot, Python, or similar technologies. Consolidate AI Services revenue across multiple teams and ensure accurate, timely reporting to Corporate Finance and executive leadership. Provide financial insights and business cases to support investments, new offerings, and growth decisions. Support pricing, deal reviews, cost modeling, and project profitability analysis. Partner with Offering, Sales, and Delivery leaders to improve business and financial performance. Establish scalable finance processes, reporting flows, and controls for a growing business. Coordinate with Treasury, Corporate Finance, Controllership, and Accounting on reporting, funding, and compliance matters. Basic Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, Technology, or a related discipline. 5+ years of experience in FP&A, controllership, commercial finance, or finance transformation. Strong experience in forecasting, financial reporting, performance analysis, and business partnering. Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder-management skills. Preferred Qualifications Hands-on experience with AI, coding, data analytics, or workflow automation, with the ability to develop and implement practical finance solutions. Experience supporting professional services, consulting, AI, or technology services. Knowledge of ERP systems, financial reporting tools, and BI platforms. Experience improving finance processes in a global, fast-changing organization We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: 岗位概述 负责联想企业数字化办公领域端到端的AI应用技术架构设计和技术路线规划， 聚焦智能协作、流程自动化、知识管理、文档智能处理等核心办公场景， 搭建具备高可扩展性与安全性的 AI 技术体系，打通业务需求并 主导生成式AI、大模型、智能体等AI技术在数字化办公场景的创新应用与规模化落地 ， 为企业创造可量化的业务价值。 岗位职责 技术路线规划：深度洞察企业办公业务痛点与行业趋势，制定 AI 技术在数字化办公领域的技术路线图及落地优先级。 架构设计：主导AI 应用架构全流程设计，涵盖数据层、算法层、服务层与应用层，平衡功能性、性能、安全性与成本，确保架构兼容联想现有 IT 生态且具备横向扩展能力。 技术落地： 主导大模型在企业办公场景的落地架构，包括RAG知识增强、Agent智能体、多智能体架构、多模态交互等技术应用 。 跨域协同：协调各业务、DT、IT团队，将业务需求转化为可落地的 AI 解决方案，推动跨部门项目高效执行，确保技术方案与业务价值对齐。 技术治理：建立 AI 应用全生命周期管理体系， 制定AI技术标准和规范， 保障系统稳定迭代与风险可控。 技术引领：跟踪 AI 前沿技术动态，引入适配办公场景的创新技术与方案，主导技术预研与原型验证，提升团队技术竞争力。 岗位要求 计算机/人工智能/软件工程相关专业，8年以上IT研发经验，其中5年以上企业级AI应用架构设计和开发经验。 精通大语言模型（LLM）的应用架构、微调技术、部署优化及生态工具（如LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex等）。 深入理解深度学习框架（如PyTorch, TensorFlow）和模型服务化技术（如Triton, vLLM）。 精通一种以上主流编程语言（如Python, Java, Go, C++），并具备卓越的系统设计能力。 熟练掌握微服务、云原生、分层架构等设计模式，具备复杂系统性能优化、高可用架构设计及技术选型决策经验，能独立输出完整架构方案。 熟悉Kubernetes、Docker等技术栈。 对系统安全、数据隐私保护及企业IT治理有深刻理解和实战经验。 有企业级AI项目落地经验， 理解企业办公系统（OA、CRM、协同工具）集成逻辑， 熟悉数字化办公、协作管理等B端场景优先。 对 AI 技术趋势保持高度敏感，具备技术预研与创新能力，能快速将前沿技术转化为实际应用。 具备复杂技术难题攻坚能力，能快速定位问题并给出最优解决方案。 具备良好的英文听说读写能力，能熟练使用英文与海外同事 沟通协作，可以高效阅读和准确理解最新的英文AI技术文章。 具备较强的技术领导力和跨团队协作能力，能有效推动复杂系统落地实施。 Additional

responsibilities: 1、设计AI产品的技术架构，确保其可扩展性、高性能和安全性。 2、领导关键技术攻关，固化最佳实践，提升团队AI技术能力。 3、设计制定AI产品技术路线图和优先级。

requirements: 岗位职责 （一）业务经营与市场目标管理 承接AI主机产品线年度经营指标，负责营收规模、毛利结构、客户增长、市场份额等核心目标拆解与落地，搭建可复盘、可迭代的营销业务经营体系； 深度研判AI主机行业赛道、算力硬件、边缘智能主机、行业定制主机市场趋势，跟踪上下游产业链、政策合规、成本价格体系变化，输出中长期市场研判与业务规划。 （二）端到端产品营销全流程操盘 贯通AI主机从市场洞察、产品定位、上市包装、定价策略、渠道铺设、市场推广到销售转化的 端到端营销闭环 ，打通产研、销售、供应链、品牌、售前体系，保障产品从研发到商业化高效落地； 负责产品市场化包装，包含产品卖点提炼、解决方案输出、行业白皮书、营销物料、标杆案例打造，适配制造业、服务业、教培、数字内容创作，OPC等多应用场景。 （三）产品竞争力体系建设 对标行业竞品AI主机产品，从硬件配置、算力性能、软件适配、系统生态、成本定价、服务体系多维度搭建差异化竞争力； 统筹产品迭代营销反馈，汇总市场、客户、渠道痛点，反向驱动产品定义、软硬件优化、功能升级，形成营销-产品迭代正向循环； 建立产品护城河，完善技术合规、数据保密、硬件安全等合规体系，适配ToB行业客户准入要求。 （四）渠道推广与品牌市场运营 制定AI主机全域营销策略，覆盖直销、代理商、行业集成商、生态合作渠道，搭建渠道分级管理与激励体系； 统筹行业展会、技术沙龙、标杆客户发布会、行业媒体投放、内容种草等营销动作，提升品牌行业知名度与行业渗透率； 负责头部标杆客户打造、行业案例沉淀，完成重点行业圈层突破，建立行业口碑壁垒。 （五）团队统筹与协同管理 牵头营销相关团队统筹管理，协同产品、研发、供应链、销售、售后团队，推进跨部门项目落地； 搭建营销SOP流程，沉淀方法论、营销工具、行业资料库，为团队规模化扩张赋能。 岗位要求： （一）AI与软件产品能力 熟悉AI主机、算力硬件、AI软硬件融合应用场景，精通ToB硬件产品从市场调研、定位定价到商业化落地的全流程； 具备AI产品实操经验，了解行业数据合规、信息安全、硬件保密规范，严格把控产品营销合规性； 理解AI大模型、边缘计算、本地部署等技术逻辑，可精准提炼软硬件产品技术卖点，完成技术向商业化语言转化。 （二）硬件行业专业背景 优先具备服务器、AI主机、工控硬件、算力终端、智能硬件相关行业背景，能够清晰理解 软硬件结合产品营销逻辑 ； 熟悉硬件供应链、成本结构、生产交付流程，可结合供应链情况制定合理定价、备货及上市节奏。 （三）综合软性能力 具备极强的自主学习与快速适配能力，可快速吃透AI硬件技术、行业政策、竞品体系，适配技术密集型科技团队节奏； 商业敏感度高，数据思维强，擅长经营分析、投入产出测算，能够以结果为导向把控业务盈利模型； 优秀的商务谈判、跨部门协同、公众宣讲能力，可独立对接大客户、行业渠道、媒体及合作方。 Additional

requirements: 你将加入联想亚太人力资源服务中心团队，一个温馨欢乐成就感爆棚的团队，主要负责为联想亚太14个国家和地区共10000多名员工/经理/人力资源合作伙伴提供人力资源所有模块以及系统的咨询服务。 职位描述： · 主要负责亚太地区员工包括人力资源系统指引，薪酬福利，组织架构，人力资源流程等等所有和人力资源相关的问题； · 如果你的日常绩效稳定优秀，还将有机会参与到跨国项目中，也可能作为讲师为亚太员工提供全英文或者日文的入职培训； · 你会参与到跨团队合作的工作中，与各国当地人事服务专员，薪酬福利团队，信息和技术化等专业团队一起为流程优化和客户体验奋斗； · 联想提供没有天花板的舞台，你将有机会在国际化公司平台和人力资源领域获得飞速成长和专业指导； · 人力资源共享服务中心全面的知识库会为你在人力资源道路上的长远发展奠定夯实的基础。 职位要求： · 日语N1或者专八； · 在日语N1/专八之上，英语六级及以上优先； · 有意愿在HR领域长期发展； · 有过人力资源相关实习经验（人力资源共享服务中心相关实习经历最佳），或有跨国公司工作经验者优先； · 具有良好的工作态度以及团队协作意识，服务意识； · 具有良好的应变及沟通能力、独立解决问题、同时解决多项任务的能力； · 熟练掌握MS Office (Word, Excel, PPT)等办公软件。

requirements: The Lenovo AI Technology Center (LATC)—Lenovo’s global AI Center of Excellence—is driving our transformation into an AI-first organization. We are assembling a world-class team of researchers, engineers, and innovators to position Lenovo and its customers at the forefront of the generational shift toward AI. Lenovo is one of the world’s leading computing companies, delivering products across the entire technology spectrum, spanning wearables, smartphones (Motorola), laptops (ThinkPad, Yoga), PCs, workstations, servers, and services/solutions. This unmatched breadth gives us a unique canvas for AI innovation, including the ability to rapidly deploy cutting-edge foundation models and to enable flexible, hybrid-cloud, and agentic computing across our full product portfolio. To this end, we are building the next wave of AI core technologies and platforms that leverage and evolve with the fast-moving AI ecosystem, including novel model and agentic orchestration & collaboration across mobile, edge, and cloud resources. This space is evolving fast and so are we. If you’re ready to shape AI at a truly global scale, with products that touch every corner of life and work, there’s no better time to join us. #LATC Job Summary: Lenovo is seeking a technical lead who will own the full agentic stack — from LLM orchestration, tool use, memory, and production deployment. Responsibilities: Design and ship agentic LLM pipelines: multi-step reasoning, tool use, reflection loops, and long-horizon planning and memory Build evaluation frameworks to measure agent reliability and safety across different tasks. Build and maintain RAG systems, vector stores, and external tool integrations Deploy and scale agent systems in production; translate relevant research into working systems Be a technical lead, working closely with other AI engineers, ML scientists, and technical product managers to put pipelines in production Keep abreast of the latest developments in AI & ML, applying cutting-edge research and methodologies to your work Required Qualifications: 6 years of industry experience in ML or applied AI with strong hands-on LLM experience (prompting, fine-tuning, inference optimization) Bachelor’s degree in computer science, applied math, physics, or a related field Experience with NLP Fluent in Python and the modern ML stack (PyTorch, Hugging Face, vLLM or equivalent) Proven experience with agentic frameworks (LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, or custom) and tool-use patterns (function calling, MCP, structured outputs) Solid grasp of RAG architecture, embedding models, and LLM evaluation methodology Strong software engineering fundamentals (python and at least one other programming language). Experience with Git, and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) Experience deploying ML models using containerization and container orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes Preferred Requirements: PhD or Master's preferred Experience with computer vision Experience with Agile frameworks, such as Scrum and Kanban Rust experience for performance-critical inference or runtime components Ability to effectively communicate technical solutions to both technical and business audiences, both verbally and in writing The base salary range budgeted for this position in Chicago is $200k - $250k. Individuals may also be considered for bonus and/or commission. Lenovo’s various

Build and maintain RAG systems, vector stores, and external tool integrations Deploy and scale agent systems in production; translate relevant research into working systems Be a technical lead, working closely with other AI engineers, ML scientists, and technical product managers to put pipelines in production Keep abreast of the latest developments in AI & ML, applying cutting-edge research and methodologies to your work Required

requirements: Job Summary: As an AI Prototyping Engineer on the LATC team, you will be the creative and technical engine that turns emerging AI ideas into tangible, working demonstrations. You will operate at the intersection of research, product, and business — rapidly building proof-of-concepts, validating technical feasibility, and communicating findings to both engineering teams and business stakeholders. This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast without breaking trust, and loves making complex AI capabilities feel real and accessible. Responsibilities: Rapid Prototyping & Experimentation Design, build, and iterate on AI agent prototypes and interactive demos that showcase novel capabilities across Lenovo's product ecosystem (mobile, edge, enterprise). Explore cutting-edge agentic frameworks, LLMs, and multimodal models to evaluate their fit for Lenovo's use cases. Maintain a "prototype-first" mindset — ship working demos in days, not months. Design, implement, and test components for a AI ‑ driven development ecosystem, including model ‑ powered tools and platform services that enhance the software delivery lifecycle. Develop intelligent agents and automated workflows that streamline software build, testing, deployment, and operational tasks across CI/CD pipelines Define, evaluate, and unify APIs, namespaces, and integration patterns across contributions from multiple developers, ensuring consistent interface design and long ‑ term architectural coherence within the platform. Develop/integrate platforms for AI models and agent behaviors assessment for performance, accuracy, robustness, and fairness, and provide actionable insights to improve reliability and developer experience. Technical Feasibility & Research Translation Conduct hands-on technical investigations of new AI models, tools, and frameworks, and produce clear feasibility reports summarizing findings, trade-offs, and recommendations. Work closely with the LATC R&D team to translate research outputs into prototype-ready implementations. Identify promising technologies early and advocate for their adoption or de-risking. Cross-Team Collaboration Partner with Business Group (BG) product teams to understand real user needs and translate them into prototype specifications. Act as a technical bridge between LATC technology pillars and business stakeholders, ensuring prototypes address genuine product priorities. Work closely with mentors and team members to document findings, share insights, and contribute to non-coding project deliverables. Stakeholder Communication Present prototype demos and technical findings to internal stakeholders, including department leaders and BG partners, in a clear and compelling way. Create supporting materials (slide decks, short videos, written summaries) that communicate the "so what" of each prototype. Gather feedback from demos and rapidly incorporate it into the next iteration. Engineering Craft Write clean, well-documented prototype code that can be handed off to production engineers when a concept is validated . Contribute to shared tooling, reusable components, and internal knowledge bases that accelerate future prototyping cycles. Required Qualifications 3–5 years of software engineering experience, with at least 1 year focused on ML/AI systems or LLM-based applications. BS/MS in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field; equivalent practical experience considered. Strong Python skills, including experience with async patterns and working with AI/ML libraries. Hands-on experience with agentic frameworks such as LangChain , LangGraph , LlamaIndex , or AutoGen . Demonstrated ability to build functional AI prototypes or demos quickly, ideally with examples to show. Comfortable working in ambiguous, fast-moving environments with shifting priorities. Strong communication skills — able to explain technical concepts to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders. Experience working across teams and gathering requirements from product or business partners. A portfolio of demos, side projects, blog posts, or open-source contributions showcasing AI work. Preferred Qualifications Experience with multimodal models (vision, speech, or on-device AI). Background in edge or mobile AI deployment (latency-constrained environments). Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or similar agent communication protocols. Experience with MLOps tools or experiment tracking frameworks ( MLflow , W&B, etc.). Comfort with presentation tools and an eye for communicating ideas visually. #LATC We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 负责安卓平板电脑产品前期概念设计阶段的热设计工作，包括风险评估、温升仿真、散热方案优化及验证。 2. 负责安卓平板电脑产品的系统散热开发，涵盖散热风扇、 VC/ 热管、微型液冷热泵、石墨材料、散热模组及其他散热材料的设计与应用。 3. 与软件、充电等相关团队协作，制定并优化产品温控策略，提升整机热性能表现。 4. 负责安卓平板电脑系统散热方案的技术路线规划（ Roadmap ），推动散热器件、新技术及新材料的预研、评估和导入。 5. 负责安卓平板电脑及相关产品的散热性能测试与验证工作，包括微型风扇噪音测试及相关分析。 6. 负责与散热材料供应商及公司内部相关团队沟通协作，推动项目顺利实施和问题闭环解决。 岗位要求： 1. 具备手机、平板电脑或相关消费电子产品散热开发经验，能够独立承担热设计开发工作。 2. 熟练掌握消费电子产品温升设计、热仿真及测试方法，具备较强的实验设计与动手实践能力。 3. 熟练使用热成像仪、热电偶、温箱等热测试设备，能够独立完成热性能评估与问题分析。 4. 熟练使用热仿真软件工具开展分析与优化工作，具有 6SigmaET （ Celsius EC Solver ）开发工具使用经验者优先。 5. 熟悉硬件产品开发流程，能够根据项目节点推进开发任务并确保按计划交付。 6. 具备良好的问题分析与解决能力，能够针对热设计相关问题提出有效改进方案。 7. 具备优秀的跨团队沟通协调能力，能够高效推动供应商及内部团队协同合作。 8. 具有较强的学习能力和技术创新意识，能够快速掌握并应用新技术、新材料及新产品开发方法。 Additional

*** This is a hybrid role, on site in our Morrisville, NC office at least 3 days per week. *** Description: Lenovo Research is looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join our On-Device Intelligence team within the broader PC Innovation and Ecosystem organization. This US-based team develops software and runtime capabilities that enable AI models to run efficiently and reliably on Lenovo PCs by combining on-device inference, internal PC sensor signals, and intelligent user-context algorithms. In this role, you will design, implement, optimize , and debug production-quality software for on-device AI model deployment and runtime execution. You will work closely with researchers, platform engineers, and product teams to integrate AI models into Windows-based PC experiences, improve latency, memory usage, power efficiency, and system reliability, and turn research concepts into robust prototypes, demos, and product-ready components. What You’ll Do In this role, you will design, implement, optimize , and debug production-quality software for on-device AI model deployment and runtime execution. You will work closely with researchers, platform engineers, and product teams to integrate AI models into Windows-based PC experiences, improve latency, memory usage, power efficiency, and system reliability, and turn research concepts into robust prototypes, demos, and product-ready components. This is a hybrid role, on site in our Morrisville, NC office at least 3 days per week. Basic Qualifications: BS or MS degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field 5 + years of professional software development experience, preferably building Windows applications, system components, SDKs, services, or runtime software Strong programming skills in C++ and Python, with solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, debugging, multithreading, optimization, and design Hands-on experience deploying, integrating, or optimizing AI/ML models for on-device or edge inference environments Experience working with AI inference runtimes or model deployment frameworks such as ONNX Runtime, TFLite , PyTorch Mobile, DirectML , OpenVINO , RyzenAI or similar technologies Understanding of model deployment tradeoffs including latency, memory footprint, power consumption, accuracy, hardware acceleration, and runtime stability Preferred Qualifications: Experience building AI runtime components, inference pipelines, model loading/execution flows, or abstraction layers for multiple model formats and hardware backends Experience with model optimization techniques such as quantization, pruning, distillation, operator fusion, batching, caching, or hardware-specific acceleration Familiarity with PC, edge, or embedded hardware acceleration technologies such as CPU, GPU, NPU, DSP, DirectML , CUDA, OpenCL, or vendor-specific AI accelerators Experience integrating AI features into Windows applications, background services, device software, or user-facing PC experiences Strong engineering practices, including Git, unit testing, profiling, CI/CD, code review, technical documentation, and cross-functional collaboration We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Principais atribuições: Executar e apoiar atividades operacionais de maior complexidade, com precisão e agilidade; Atuar em exceções, demandas críticas e temas fora do padrão, garantindo qualidade das entregas. requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 负责 Android 系统及应用核心场景的性能优化工作，包括应用启动速度、 UI 渲染流畅度、触控响应时延及内存占用等关键指标的提升。 2. 定位并解决卡顿、掉帧、 ANR 、内存泄漏以及高负载场景下性能退化等典型性能问题。 3. 基于性能分析工具和监控数据，开展应用层至系统层的性能诊断与根因分析，持续推动性能优化方案落地。 4. 结合业务场景和产品需求，制定并实施系统化性能优化策略，提升终端设备整体使用体验。 岗位要求： 1. 具备 Android 领域性能优化经验，深入理解 Android 系统架构，熟悉 AMS 、 WMS 、 Binder 、 SurfaceFlinger 、 ART 虚拟机等核心模块原理。 2. 熟悉 Linux 内核相关机制，包括进程调度（ CFS ）、内存管理（回收与压缩）、文件系统以及 CPU/GPU 动态调频策略等。 3. 熟练使用 Perfetto 、 Systrace 、 ftrace 、 Simpleperf 、 MAT 等性能分析工具，具备从应用层到内核层的性能问题定位与分析能力。 4. 具备 Android 手机或平板设备性能调优经验者优先。 5. 熟悉主流移动平台架构及性能特性者优先，包括高通 87xx 、 88xx 、 86xx 系列以及 MTK 24M/25M 、 24E 、 25P 等平台。 6. 具备良好的英文听说能力，能够与海外团队进行日常技术沟通者优先。 Additional

Why Lenovo? At Lenovo, we believe smarter technology takes us further. We deliver bold innovation powered by AI, cloud, and intelligent devices that transform the way the world works and connects. No matter what team you join, you'll find yourself collaborating with forward-thinking innovators who are passionate about building the next generation of technology experiences. Join us to shape a future powered by intelligent transformation, where your ideas drive real change and your career grows in ways only Lenovo can offer. About the Role Lenovo's Cloud & Software business is seeking an Associate Product Manager, Hybrid AI Platform as part of our Fresh Grad Program. This position sits at the intersection of product management, agentic AI, and platform engineering. You will help build the runtime, services, and developer surfaces that let product teams across Lenovo ship agentic and hybrid AI features without having to stand up their own model routing, NPU integration, or agent infrastructure. You will contribute to a platform that spans on-device inference, cloud orchestration, and the connective tissue between them, working alongside experienced product managers, engineers, and designers. You will also receive hands-on, on-the-job training with Lenovo's product management experts to strengthen your technical and strategic leadership skills. This role is in Morrisville, NC. And operates under a hybrid schedule (three days onsite, two days remote). This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship now or in the future. Candidates must have authorization to work in the United States without the need for sponsorship, including CPT or OPT. Responsibilities Support the product strategy and roadmap for an agentic AI runtime that runs on Lenovo devices and integrates with cloud models, contributing to the developer surfaces, tooling, and packaging that make the platform usable by product teams across the company. Partner with internal product teams shipping AI features into commercial and consumer experiences to capture requirements, gather feedback, and shorten delivery timelines. Contribute to the product definition for hybrid AI workload orchestration, learning how we decide what runs on the NPU, what runs in the cloud, and how policy and routing work across cost, latency, privacy, and capability tradeoffs. Track emerging agentic patterns such as tool use, MCP, A2A, multi-step reasoning, and model routing, and help translate them into concrete platform primitives, APIs, and SDKs. Draft PRD sections, run competitive and ecosystem research, and validate ideas with engineering and internal adopters. Build and maintain business documentation, feature roadmaps, and sprint artifacts using JIRA and Confluence. Partner with engineering, design, security, and ecosystem teams to support platform releases on a predictable cadence, helping manage dependencies between platform readiness and downstream product launches. Engage with internal adopters and, over time, external ecosystem partners across silicon, OS, model providers, and ISVs to align on capabilities, interfaces, and roadmap. Bring fresh thinking to how we plan and deliver work in an AI-native world, contributing to best practice documentation and supporting Lenovo's talent pipeline by collaborating with fellow Fresh Grad Program participants. Basic Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Business Administration, Design, or a related field. Internship, co-op, capstone, or other project experience in product management, software development, design, or a closely related discipline. Demonstrated experience using JIRA and Confluence for software product lifecycle management. Familiarity with the technical primitives of modern AI products: model APIs, inference, agents, tool calling, retrieval, and the differences between on-device and cloud execution. This can come from coursework, internships, side projects, or self-directed learning. Strong analytical thinking, communication, and collaboration skills. Passion for emerging technologies, AI innovation, and continuous learning. Preferred Qualifications Hands-on experience building with LLMs, agents, MCP, or hybrid AI architectures, including personal projects and prototypes. Exposure to generative AI platforms such as Cursor, Magic Patterns or Copilot etc. for product management or development workflows. Ability to work cross-functionally and communicate complex business and technical concepts clearly through written documentation and presentations. Comfort with ambiguity and a track record of bringing structure to open-ended problems. Exposure to working with global, cross-cultural teams. requirements: We are looking for a driven, curious, and consumer-focused marketer with a passion for software experiences, AI, and emerging technology. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of innovation, storytelling, and strategy—someone who can simplify complex technology into experiences that feel useful, intuitive, and exciting. As the B2B Software & Monetization Product Marketing Specialist , you will help shape how Motorola brings software experiences, enterprise solutions, and monetization platforms to market. You will serve as both the voice of the consumer and an advocate for enterprise customers throughout the product journey, ensuring experiences deliver value for businesses while remaining seamless and user-friendly. This role works cross-functionally across product management, engineering, UX design, partnerships, PR, sales, and global marketing teams. Success in this role requires a strong blend of strategic thinking, creativity, and cross-functional collaboration to deliver experiences that are intuitive, scalable, and valuable for both businesses and end users. A key aspect of this role is understanding the balance between enterprise needs, business goals, and the end-user experience. While many B2B product decisions are influenced by stakeholders such as IT teams, procurement leaders, and operations teams, the ideal candidate will champion intuitive, consumer-grade experiences while helping shape monetization opportunities that feel valuable, relevant, and thoughtfully integrated into the user journey. Scope of Responsibilities Translate complex software capabilities and monetization features into clear, compelling consumer and enterprise messaging. Develop positioning, value propositions, messaging frameworks, and go-to-market strategies for B2B software experiences and monetization platforms. Partner with product,business development, sales, engineering, UX, and business teams to influence feature direction and advocate for intuitive user experiences. Understand enterprise customer needs across different industries and help position solutions accordingly. Help shape monetization strategies and software value stories that align business goals with meaningful user experiences. Create product marketing briefs and lead integrated marketing kickoffs across cross-functional teams and agencies. Conduct competitive analysis, market research, and consumer insight gathering to identify trends and opportunities. Partner with PR, creative, sales, and regional marketing teams to develop impactful storytelling and launch strategies. Monitor product adoption, customer feedback, and usage trends to refine positioning and improve the overall experience. requirements: Sr Business Development Manager - Credit Risk - Consumer & Retail Lending Financial Services / Fintech · Brazil · Argentina · Colombia · Mexico 📋 Overall Description: We are looking for an experienced and strategic credit risk leader to build and lead our consumer financing function, with a primary focus on smartphone financing and direct-to-consumer (CDC) retail lending. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of structuring credit areas from the ground up, strong analytical skills and the ability to bridge technical modeling with business strategy. In this role, you will work closely with fintech partners to design and scale credit solutions and, as we expand across Latin America, you will own the end-to-end credit risk strategy for our personal retail portfolios in Brazil and play a key role in adapting our credit frameworks to new LATAM markets — including local regulatory environments, bureau ecosystems and consumer credit behavior. This is a high-ownership role for a builder who combines analytical depth with the cross-border business fluency to operate across Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, Colombia and beyond. 🚀 Key Responsibilities: Lead the full CDC (Crédito Direto ao Consumidor) credit strategy: smartphone financing, personal loans, payroll-deductible (consignado) and retail consumer financing. Define and evolve credit policies, underwriting criteria and risk appetite for PF retail segments. Own end-to-end credit cycle: origination, behavioral scoring, portfolio monitoring, collections strategy and PDD provisioning. Govern FIDC (Fundo de Investimento em Direitos Creditórios) structures, support investor reporting and auditor relations. Lead fraud prevention: rules engines, bureau integrations and identity validation. Define and monitor portfolio KPIs: vintage curves, delinquency buckets, loss rates and profitability per cohort. Act as 2nd-line governance partner — independently challenging 1st-line credit decisions and escalating emerging risks. Partner with Product and Technology to embed risk intelligence into new product design and automated decisioning. Partner with Product, Legal, Business Development and Marketing to design credit-ready go-to-market strategies for each new country. Build and present executive-level business reports and committee materials. ✅ Skills & Requirements: 8-12 years in credit risk, with 3+ years in a senior or lead role in financial services or fintech. Deep expertise in CDC (Crédito Direto ao Consumidor) and personal retail credit — origination, behavioral scoring, collections and loss provisioning. FIDC (Fundo de Investimento em Direitos Creditórios) governance and securitization experience (liability-side investor relations). Track record in PF retail products: smartphone financing, personal loans, payroll (consignado), credit cards, or consumer installment financing. Hands-on experience with PDD/ECL provisioning and Bacen regulatory frameworks. Proven ability to build or scale credit areas from scratch in growth-stage environments. Strong data skills. Fluency in Portuguese, English and Spanish languages. Availability to work in a hybrid schedule: 3 days on-site and 2 days remote. Preferred Qualifications (these will be considered a plus): Prior exposure to credit operations in Mexico, Colombia, or Argentina — knowledge of local bureau ecosystems and regulatory frameworks. Experience with open finance/open banking data in credit decisioning. ML-based scoring (gradient boosting, logistic regression at scale). Experience with cross-border product launches or regulatory market entry processes. Passion for ESG, financial inclusion, or impact-driven lending models. 📍 This position is located at Av Chedid Jafet, 222 - Vila Olimpia - São Paulo. #MBG Additional

requirements: We are seeking a highly analytical and proactive Component Engineer to join our ISG GP (Infrastructure Solutions Group) organization. In this role, you will be responsible for the evaluation, selection, and lifecycle management of electronic and electromechanical components for our next-generation Server and Data Center products . Working at the intersection of Hardware R&D, Global Procurement, and Quality Assurance, you will ensure that all components meet the rigorous performance, reliability, and cost standards required for enterprise-grade server environments. You will play a crucial role in mitigating supply chain risks, driving cost-reduction initiatives, and resolving complex component-level technical issues. Key Responsibilities Component Selection & Qualification: Partner with Hardware Design Engineers to define and select critical components (e.g., Memory, Storage, ICs, Power Components, VRMs, Connectors) for server motherboard and system designs. Ensure components meet enterprise-grade specifications. Alternative Sourcing & Cost Optimization: Proactively identify, evaluate, and qualify second-source alternatives to optimize material costs, reduce lead times, and prevent supply chain bottlenecks without compromising server reliability. Lifecycle & Risk Management: Monitor component lifecycles continuously. Manage and execute Product Change Notifications (PCN), End-of-Life (EOL), and Last Time Buy (LTB) processes specifically tailored to the long-lifecycle requirements of server products. AVL/AML Database Management: Maintain and ensure the accuracy of the Approved Vendor List (AVL) and Approved Manufacturer List (AML) within our PLM and ERP systems (e.g., Agile, SAP). Failure Analysis & Resolution: Lead Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for component-level failures occurring during NPI (New Product Introduction), mass production, or field returns (RMA). Drive suppliers to provide 8D reports and implement effective Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA). Supplier Technical Management: Act as the primary technical interface between ISG GP and key component suppliers. Conduct supplier audits, assess their technical roadmaps, and align their offerings with our server product strategies. Compliance & Sustainability: Ensure all selected components comply with international environmental, safety, and industry standards (e.g., RoHS, REACH, CE, UL). Qualifications & Requirements Education & EE Background: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering (EE) , Electronics Engineering, or a closely related technical field. A solid foundation in EE principles is essential for this role. Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of experience as a Component Engineer, Hardware Engineer, or FAE, preferably within the Server, Data Center, or Enterprise IT hardware industry. Additional

requirements: Responsibilities Deal Qualification, Shaping and Strategy Drive sales and solution strategy development, deal qualification and application of best practice sessions, facilitating these for each assigned engagement. Focus on opportunity construct and qualification parameters in support of continual qualification. Analyse client requirements to inform internal messaging and positioning in support of a qualification decision. Client Engagement Develop Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) business case for the client engagement. Develop a deep understanding of our products and services, target market and competitive landscape to deliver proposals that highlight our unique value proposition. Develop a strong understanding of the client context, footprint and strategics objectives, ensuring these are reflected across all communications and proposal documentation. Work with Sales Leaders to facilitate application of a “relationship sales” methodology to help build and enhance Lenovo/Client relationships, aligning procurement objectives and timeline with the client, and supporting the wider account team in this process. Own formal communication channels with the client. Work collaboratively with the pursuit team to organize, prepare and run real time client engagement. End to End Bid Execution Manages the bid through each sales stage, ensuring end-to-end compliance with the current company processes, corporate governance, and engaging stakeholders. Lead multi-disciplinary, geographically disperse, high-performing bid teams on assigned deals. Maintain regular cadence of calls and reviews, monitor progress and manage priorities, risks, and issues across assigned deals. Maintain accountability for the detailed bid plan, identification of staffing and associated budget estimation communication, replanning, progress tracking, achievement of milestones & win strategy. Coordinate activities related to clarifications (CQs) and their responses, to and from the client. Engage with partner companies and subcontractors (as appropriate), facilitate communication with bid team members. Manage and collaborate closely with the Proposal Manager to drive the development of winning, compelling, and compliant bid responses with timely submission to customer timeframes Actively engage in all gate reviews throughout the deal flow, including Deal Qualification Review, Technical Certification, Deal Review, Contract Review, Win/Loss Reviews and Solution Handover. Ensure timescales are achieved at each step of the bid process, including all internal governance, while taking the initiative in setting realistic deadlines. Continuous Improvement Maintain current knowledge of industry best practices, proposal trends and evolving client demands. Seek feedback from sales teams, clients, and internal stakeholders to improve bid execution quality, effectiveness and win rates. Identify opportunities to streamline and automate the bid execution process. Contribute to the development and enhancement of proposal templates, tools & resources. Qualifications Bachelors Degree in business, project management or a related field. MBA or equivalent is a plus. Accomplished bid leader with demonstrable success managing IT services opportunities in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines, Experience in managing and tracking multiple time-phased activities. Strong project management and process application skills and knowledge. External project management certification such as PMP from PMI or other project management certification is preferred. Ability to facilitate business activities including workshops to develop compelling messaging and winning solutions that deliver client outcomes. Familiarity with proposal management software and tools. Experience with as-a-Service and Hybrid Cloud Solutions offerings. Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, PowerPoint, Excel), graphic design and/or desktop publishing an advantage. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams. Ability to work as part of a global team which may require engaging across distances, cultures, and time zones in a matrix organizational structure. APMP Practitioner Certification or possession of skill set and experience to acquire certification required. 10+ years of progressive sales focused business experience in the information technology sector.
